# GitHub Issue Generator Skill

## Overview

This skill helps you create structured GitHub issues and pull requests following the Epic → Module → Task → PR workflow.

## When to Use

- User wants to create an **Epic** (parent issue) with multiple modules
- User needs to generate **Modules** (sub-issues) from an Epic
- User wants to create **Tasks** (individual issues)
- User needs to generate **Pull Requests** with proper format
- Commands like: "create Epic", "generate PR", "create task"

## Project Structure

```
Epic (Issue #1)
  └── Module (Issue #2)
        └── Task (Issue #3)
              └── PR → Closes #3
        └── Task (Issue #4)
              └── PR → Closes #4
        PR Module → Closes #2
  PR Final → Closes #1 → dev
```

## Branch Convention

```
dev
  └── feat/project-name
        ├── feat/project-name/module1
        │     └── task/project-name/module1/task1
        └── feat/project-name/module2
              └── task/project-name/module2/task1
```

## Issue Types

### Epic
Large project or feature. Contains multiple Modules.

| Field | Required | Example |
|-------|----------|---------|
| Title | Yes | "🚀 Epic: Landing Page" |
| Base branch | Yes | `feat/project-name` |
| Destination branch | Yes | `dev` |
| Modules | Yes | List: Auth, Citas, Perfil... |

### Module
Sub-feature inside an Epic.

| Field | Required | Example |
|-------|----------|---------|
| Title | Yes | "🏗️ Module: Authentication" |
| Epic ID | Yes | #1 |
| Branch | Yes | `feat/project-name/auth` |
| Tasks | Yes | List: login, register... |

### Task
Individual implementation task.

| Field | Required | Example |
|-------|----------|---------|
| Title | Yes | "task/auth/login" |
| Branch | Yes | `task/project-name/auth/login` |
| Base branch | Yes | `feat/project-name/auth` |

## Available Labels

| Label | Color | Use for |
|-------|-------|---------|
| Backend | 🟣 #7B1FA2 | Server issues |
| Frontend | 🔵 #1976D2 | UI issues |
| Finished | 🟢 #4CAF50 | Completed |
| Working | 🟠 #FF9800 | In progress |
| Epic | 🟣 #9C27B0 | Large project |
| Module | 🟣 #673AB7 | Sub-feature |
| Task | 🔵 #2196F3 | Individual task |
| Landing | 🩷 #E91E63 | Landing page |
| Auth | 🔴 #F44336 | Authentication |

## Available Milestones

| # | Milestone | Description |
|---|-----------|-------------|
| 1 | Frontend | React, components, UI |
| 2 | Backend | API, auth, DB, integrations |
| 3 | Documentación | README, guides, user stories |
| 4 | Diseño | Wireframes, mockups |
| 5 | QA | Testing, E2E, bugs |

## Templates Location

Issue templates are in `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`:
- `epic.md` - Epic template
- `module.md` - Module template
- `task.md` - Task template
- `bug.md` - Bug report

PR templates are in `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/`:
- `01-task-pr.md` - Task PR
- `02-module-pr.md` - Module PR
- `03-final-pr.md` - Final PR (closes Epic)

## Example: Creating an Epic

```
gh issue create \
  --title "🚀 Epic: Landing Page" \
  --template epic.md \
  --label "Epic" \
  --label "Landing" \
  --milestone "Frontend" \
  --assignee "@me"
```

## Example: Creating a PR

```
gh pr create \
  --title "task/auth/login: Login implementation" \
  --template 01-task-pr.md \
  --label "Task" \
  --label "Working" \
  --assignee "@me"
```
